name: AgentPay
description: Payment infrastructure for AI agents. Check balances, spend funds, transfer between agents, manage on-chain USDC wallets, pay for x402 resources, and query agent identity/trust scores.

skills.name: Check Balance
skills.description: Check the agent's current balance, daily limits, and spending info.

skills.name: Spend Funds
skills.description: Deduct from the agent's wallet and get a transaction receipt.

skills.name: Transaction History
skills.description: Get recent transactions for the agent.

skills.name: On-Chain Wallet
skills.description: Get on-chain wallet address and balance for Base, Polygon, BNB, or Solana.

skills.name: x402 Payment
skills.description: Pay for an x402-gated HTTP resource using the agent's on-chain USDC wallet.

skills.name: Agent Identity (KYA)
skills.description: Get agent identity profile including trust score and verification status.

skills.name: Register Webhook
skills.description: Register a webhook endpoint for real-time event notifications.

authentication.credentials: API key via X-API-Key header. Create an agent at @FundmyAIbot on Telegram.
